collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (7 total Queries, 6 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT a.*, j.title as job_title, j.location, j.type, j.department FROM applications a JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.job_id WHERE a.user_id = 3 ORDER BY a.applied_at DESC
SELECT job_id as id, jobs.* FROM jobs WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 6

queries.hover: This query was called more than once.

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT a.*, j.title as job_title, j.location, j.type, j.department FROM applications a JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.job_id WHERE a.user_id = 3 ORDER BY a.applied_at DESC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT job_id as id, jobs.* FROM jobs WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 6
